text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
There will certianly be plenty of races 
lined up, so be proactive in entering them!

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
After training a trainee, you can enter her 
in races. And with the rewards from those, 
you can strenghten your girls or supports—

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
Training and racing, this flow is 
the key to raising strong trainees! 
Remember that well!
